admin.deleteCompanyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
admin.deleteCompanyConfirmFull: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will delete all associated data.
admin.oidcConfigDesc: Configure OpenID Connect (PKCE) for single sign-on authentication. OIDC will be enabled when both Issuer URL and Client ID are provided.
admin.oidcIssuerUrlHelp: The OpenID Connect discovery endpoint URL
admin.clientIdHelp: The OAuth 2.0 Client ID (PKCE mode, no secret needed)
admin.createCompanyDesc: Set up a new company and configure OIDC authentication
admin.emailDomainHelp: Users with this email domain will be routed to this company

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your project activity
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Get started by creating your first project or selecting an existing one.

projectSettings.title: Project settings
projectSettings.deleteDescription: Permanently remove this project and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Manage your projects and track progress
projects.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start collaborating with AI agents.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Chorus organizes work into Project Groups and Projects. Let's set up your workspace.
onboarding.whatIsGroupDesc: A container for related projects. Think of it as a team, product line, or initiative — e.g., "Mobile Apps" or "Q3 Launch".
onboarding.whatIsProjectDesc: Where work happens. Each project has its own ideas, proposals, documents, and tasks. AI agents collaborate within projects.
onboarding.step1Desc: Start by organizing your workspace. Create a group to hold related projects.
onboarding.step2Desc: Add a project inside your group. This is where you'll capture ideas and assign work to AI agents.
onboarding.agentTipTitle: Have an Admin Agent? Let AI do the setup
onboarding.agentTipDesc: Copy this prompt and send it to your admin agent to automatically create project groups and projects:
onboarding.agentPrompt: Please help me set up the workspace. Create a project group called "{groupName}" with description "{groupDesc}", then create a project called "{projectName}" inside it.
onboarding.agentPromptDefault: Please help me set up the workspace. Create a project group named "My Team" with a brief description, then create an initial project inside it.

projects.createNewProjectDesc: Start a new project and invite your team

createNew.title: Create New Project
createNew.subtitle: Set up your project details, then assign ideas to PM Agent later
createNew.gettingStartedDesc: Fill in the basics below. Once created, you can add ideas and assign them to PM Agent for proposal generation.
createNew.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this project is about...
createNew.initialIdeasDesc: Share any initial thoughts or requirements for PM Agent to consider when generating proposals
createNew.ideaPlaceholder: e.g., We need user authentication with OAuth support...
createNew.documentsDesc: Upload PRD, technical design, or any reference documents for PM Agent to analyze
createNew.dragDrop: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.subtitle: Capture and track ideas for your project
ideas.startByAdding: Start by adding your first idea. Ideas can be picked up by AI agents for analysis.
ideas.ideasWithStatus: Ideas with this status will appear here.
ideas.selectIdeaAssignee: Choose how to assign this idea
ideas.assignToMyselfIdeaDesc: All your PM Agents can see and process this idea
ideas.onlySelectedPmAgentCanWork: Only the selected PM Agent can process this idea
ideas.releaseIdeaAssigneeDesc: Remove current assignee and make this idea available again
ideas.deleteIdeaConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
ideas.moveIdeaDescription: Select a project to move this idea to. Linked draft or pending proposals will also be moved.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Kanban board for task management
tasks.onlySelectedAgentCanWork: Only the selected agent can work on this task
tasks.deleteTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
tasks.dependencyBlockedDescription: This task has unresolved dependencies. Moving it to In Progress may cause issues.
tasks.forceMoveConfirm: Are you sure you want to move this task to In Progress? Its dependencies have not been completed yet.
tasks.blockedTooltip: Blocked by {count} unresolved {count, plural, one {dependency} other {dependencies}}

proposals.subtitle: Review and approve AI-generated proposals
proposals.noProposalsDesc: Proposals are created by PM Agents when they analyze ideas. They will appear here for your review.
proposals.reviewInstructions: Review the content and approve or reject this proposal.
proposals.emptyContainer: This proposal container is empty. Add documents or tasks to it.
proposals.approveProposalDesc: Optionally add a note for the proposal creator (e.g., instructions for the agent).
proposals.rejectProposalDesc: Please provide a reason for rejecting this proposal.
proposals.title: Title
proposals.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this proposal is about...
proposals.noAvailableIdeas: No available ideas. You need to claim an idea first.
proposals.selectAtLeastOneIdea: Please select at least one idea
proposals.draftNotice: This proposal is in draft. Add content and submit for review when ready.
proposals.confirmSubmitDesc: Once submitted, the proposal content cannot be edited until reviewed.
proposals.closeProposalDesc: Closing this proposal is permanent. Please provide a reason.
proposals.closedNotice: This proposal has been permanently closed.
proposals.revokeProposalDesc: This will close all tasks and delete all documents created by this proposal. The proposal will return to draft status.
proposals.revokeTasksToClose: {count, plural, one {# task to close} other {# tasks to close}}
proposals.revokeDocsToDelete: {count, plural, one {# document to delete} other {# documents to delete}}
proposals.cyclicDependency: Cannot add dependency: would create a cycle
proposals.deleteTaskDraftConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task draft?
proposals.deleteProposalDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this proposal? This action cannot be undone.

proposalValidation.title: Submission Checklist
proposalValidation.E1: Must include at least one PRD document
proposalValidation.E3: Must include at least one task
proposalValidation.E4: Must link to at least one input Idea
proposalValidation.W1: Consider adding a technical design document
proposalValidation.W4: Multiple tasks exist but no dependencies are defined
proposalValidation.I2: Task "{title}" has no story points estimated

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: PRDs, specs, and project documentation
documents.noDocumentsDesc: Documents are created when proposals are approved. You can also create documents manually.
documents.clickToUpload: Click to upload a Markdown file

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and agent configurations
settings.agentsDesc: Create API keys to allow your personal agents to access Chorus. Each key can be assigned different roles.
settings.noApiKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.
settings.developerAgentDesc: Execute tasks, write code, report issues, commits
settings.pmAgentDesc: Analyze requirements, write proposals, manage tasks
settings.adminAgentDesc: Human-level permissions: approve proposals, verify tasks, create projects
settings.adminWarningDesc: You are creating an Agent with human-level permissions. This Agent will be able to:
settings.adminConfirmCheckbox: I understand the risks and confirm creating an Admin Agent
settings.apiKeyCreatedDesc: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!
settings.name: Name
settings.agentRolesDesc: Select the roles this API key has access to.
settings.agentPersonaDesc: Select a preset or write your own persona. This defines how the agent behaves in all interactions.
settings.agentPersonaDescNoRoles: Define how this agent should behave in all interactions.
settings.personaPlaceholder: Describe how this agent should behave. For example: 'You are a helpful assistant that focuses on clarity and simplicity...'
settings.personaHint: You can edit the text above or write your own custom persona.
settings.personaHintNoRoles: Write a custom persona for your agent.
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?
settings.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
settings.editAgentDesc: Update this agent's name, roles, and persona.
settings.setupGuideDesc: Set up your AI agent connection step by step

login.title: Chorus
login.subtitle: AI-Human Collaboration Platform
login.helpText: Enter your email to sign in or create an account
login.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please start login again.
login.noOrganizationFound: No organization found for this email

pickWorkspace.title: Choose a workspace
pickWorkspace.subtitle: Your email is registered in {count} workspaces. Pick one to sign in.
pickWorkspace.noCandidates: No workspaces found for this email.
pickWorkspace.errorLoading: Failed to load workspaces. Please try again.

projectOverview.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently delete all associated ideas, proposals, tasks, documents, and activity.

personas.devPmDesc: You are a product manager who prioritizes developer experience and builds developer-first products. You understand technical constraints and communicate effectively with engineering teams.
personas.fullPmDesc: You are a comprehensive product manager with the mindset of building products that solve real problems for your target audience. You balance business goals, user needs, and technical feasibility.
personas.simplePmDesc: You are a focused product manager who prioritizes core features first, avoiding over-engineering. You believe in shipping fast, gathering feedback, and iterating quickly.
personas.seniorDevDesc: You are a senior software developer with extensive experience in building scalable systems. You write clean, maintainable code and follow best practices. You mentor junior developers and make architectural decisions.
personas.fullstackDevDesc: You are a versatile full-stack developer comfortable working across the entire stack. You can build APIs, design databases, and create responsive UIs. You prioritize user experience and performance.
personas.pragmaticDevDesc: You are a practical developer who focuses on delivering working solutions quickly. You avoid premature optimization, write tests for critical paths, and prefer simple solutions over complex abstractions.
personas.carefulAdminDesc: You are a careful administrator who thoroughly reviews all proposals and tasks before approval. You verify that acceptance criteria are met, check for potential issues, and document your reasoning. When in doubt, you prefer to ask for clarification rather than approve blindly.
personas.efficientAdminDesc: You are an efficient administrator who streamlines the approval process while maintaining quality standards. You trust the team's work but still perform necessary checks. You focus on unblocking work quickly while ensuring basic quality gates are met.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this session?

elaboration.title: Requirements Elaboration
elaboration.skipConfirmDescription: This will mark requirements as resolved without structured Q&A. You should only skip for trivially clear requests.
elaboration.skipReasonPlaceholder: e.g., Bug fix with clear reproduction steps
elaboration.elaborationRequiredHint: Complete or skip elaboration to create a proposal

welcome.title: Welcome to Chorus
welcome.description: Chorus is an AI-Human collaboration platform. AI agents propose, humans verify — through a structured development lifecycle.

completion.title: You're All Set!
completion.description: Your agent is configured and ready to collaborate. Start by creating a project or exploring your settings.

createAgent.title: Create Your AI Agent
createAgent.description: Set up an AI agent with the roles and persona that match your workflow. This will generate an API key for the agent.

copyKey.title: Copy Your API Key
copyKey.description: Save this API key somewhere safe. You will need it to configure your AI agent client.
copyKey.warning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!

install.description: Choose your AI agent client and follow the setup instructions below.

claudeCode.step1Tip: Tip: Add these to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc for persistence.
claudeCode.step2Title: Step 2: Open Claude Code and run

codex.step1Tip: Tip: Add these to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc for persistence.
codex.step2Tip: The script registers the plugin marketplace and writes the MCP server entry into ~/.codex/config.toml.
codex.step3Desc: Open Codex and ask it to check in to Chorus — e.g. type "check in to chorus".

openClaw.step3Desc: Restart the OpenClaw gateway process to pick up the new configuration.
openClaw.step4Desc: In the OpenClaw chat window, type the following command:
openClaw.troubleshootingFix: This error means hooks are not enabled. Set "hooks.enabled" to true in your openclaw.json configuration and restart the gateway.

other.description: Copy the prompt below and send it to your AI agent to configure the Chorus connection.
